name: Nutty Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Smoked chicken or ham (cut into strips)
2 cups Hot cooked rice (white or brown)
recipeInstructions:
1. Have all ingredients ready before starting to cook.
2. In a small bowl, combine broth, oyster sauce, soy sauce, and cornstarch. Set aside.
3. Heat a nonstick large skillet or wok over high heat for 1 minute.
4. Add oil, mushrooms, and walnuts; cook, tossing constantly with spatula, for 1 minute.
5. Add bell pepper, scallions, and chicken; cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
6. Add broth mixture; cook until thickened, about 10 seconds.
7. Serve with rice.
Each serving (1/2 cup rice) provides:
1 Fat, 1-1/2 Veggies, 1 Protein, 1 Carb, 6 Carbs.
Per serving:
274 cal, 12 g pro, 36 g carbs
9 g fat: 4 g poly, 3 g mono, 1 g sat
689 mg sodium, 19 mg cholesterol.
